/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -Wall -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bagsim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bagsim.dir/src/bagsimulator/bagsim_gui.cpp.o -o bagsim   -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib  -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/assimp/lib  -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/freetype/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib:/home/rodrigo/Libraries/assimp/lib:/home/rodrigo/Libraries/freetype/lib:/home/rodrigo/Libraries/boost1.88/lib:/home/rodrigo/Ros2_cam_lidar_calibration/CamLidarApplication/build:/home/rodrigo/Ros2_cam_lidar_calibration/CamLidarApplication/build/glfw/src /home/rodrigo/Libraries/boost1.88/lib/libboost_thread.so.1.88.0 libmain_scene.so liblidar_scan.so libgrid.so libutility.so libtexture_loader.so libcamera.so libmesh.so libmodel.so glfw/src/libglfw.so.3.5 -lassimp /usr/lib64/libfreetype.so libImGuizmo.so libglad.so libshader.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so libimgui.so
